sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10880" key="a)nupomenete/os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνυπο-μενετέος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n10880.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not to be sustained,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.6.6</biblScope> </bibl>:—also <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνυπο-μενετός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
